content: The Self-Refine framework for iterative code improvement can be restructured to integrate multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a 'multi-lens self-refinement pipeline that outperforms both single-perspective Self-Refine and standard single-pass self-reflection. This hybrid approach leverages Self-Refine's training-free iterative structure to turn the disparate perspectives into progressively better outputs without additional training or supervision.
